tasks.label: Build API Service with Clean Architecture
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.ApiService/ChurchRegister.ApiService.csproj

tasks.label: Add Initial Migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Add Initial Migration (From Database Project)

tasks.label: Add Initial Migration Verbose
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate --context ChurchRegisterWebContext --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService --verbose

tasks.label: Update Database
tasks.command: dotnet ef database update --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Test Application Startup
tasks.command: dotnet run --project ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Drop Database
tasks.command: dotnet ef database drop --force --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Create Initial Migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add InitialChurchRegisterMigration --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService --context ChurchRegisterWebContext --output-dir Migrations

tasks.label: Add Envelope Contribution Migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add AddEnvelopeContributionBatch --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService --context ChurchRegisterWebContext

tasks.label: Add Envelope Contribution Migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add AddEnvelopeContributionBatch --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService --context ChurchRegisterWebContext

tasks.label: Add Pastoral Care Migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add AddPastoralCareRequired --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService --context ChurchRegisterWebContext

tasks.label: Update Database - Pastoral Care
tasks.command: dotnet ef database update --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Remove All Migrations
tasks.command: cd ChurchRegister.Database && dotnet ef migrations remove --force --startup-project ../ChurchRegister.ApiService && dotnet ef migrations remove --force --startup-project ../ChurchRegister.ApiService && dotnet ef migrations remove --force --startup-project ../ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Remove All Migrations
tasks.command: cd ChurchRegister.Database; dotnet ef migrations remove --force --startup-project ../ChurchRegister.ApiService; dotnet ef migrations remove --force --startup-project ../ChurchRegister.ApiService; dotnet ef migrations remove --force --startup-project ../ChurchRegister.ApiService

tasks.label: Build Tests Project
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj

tasks.label: Run All Tests
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --no-build --logger "console;verbosity=minimal"

tasks.label: Run Tests Summary
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --logger trx --verbosity normal 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'passed|failed|skipped|error|Passed|Failed|Skipped|Error|Total'

tasks.label: Run Tests Errors Only
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --verbosity normal 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'Failed|Error Message|Expected|Actual|Stack' -Context 0,3

tasks.label: Run Failed Tests
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --logger "trx;LogFileName=testresults.trx" --filter "FullyQualifiedName~CreateChurchMember|FullyQualifiedName~SubmitEnvelopeBatch|FullyQualifiedName~GetContributionHistory_WithDate|FullyQualifiedName~GetContributionHistory_WithContributions|FullyQualifiedName~DuplicateBankReference|FullyQualifiedName~AnotherMembersBankReference"

tasks.label: Run All Tests Final
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: Add HSBCExcludedReferences Migration
tasks.command: dotnet ef migrations add AddHsbcExcludedReferences --project ChurchRegister.Database --startup-project ChurchRegister.ApiService --context ChurchRegisterWebContext

tasks.label: Run District Export Test Only
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ExportDistrictsMemberList_ReturnsOk" --verbosity normal

tasks.label: npm run build
tasks.command: cd ChurchRegister.React && npm run build 2>&1

tasks.label: npm run build React
tasks.command: cd ChurchRegister.React; npm run build

tasks.label: Run dotnet outdated
tasks.command: dotnet tool install -g dotnet-outdated-tool 2>&1; dotnet outdated ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1

tasks.label: Build full solution after upgrades
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1

tasks.label: Build full solution after dependency fix
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1

tasks.label: Build check - errors and warnings
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln --no-incremental 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|warning|Build succeeded|FAILED|Error' | Out-String

tasks.label: Test results summary
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --verbosity minimal 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'passed|failed|skipped|Error|Passed|Failed|Total' | Out-String

tasks.label: Check dotnet SDKs
tasks.command: dotnet --list-sdks 2>&1

tasks.label: dotnet outdated on net10.0
tasks.command: dotnet outdated ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1

tasks.label: Build net10 - errors check
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln --no-incremental 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern '^.*error|Build succeeded|FAILED|Error\(' | Out-String

tasks.label: Restore and build net10
tasks.command: dotnet restore ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1 | Select-String 'error|Build succeeded|Error\(' } else { Write-Host 'RESTORE FAILED' }

tasks.label: Test net10 results
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --verbosity minimal 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'passed|failed|skipped|Error|Passed|Failed|Total' | Out-String

tasks.label: Run tests on net10.0
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj 2>&1 | tail -5

tasks.label: Clean test net10 final
tasks.command: dotnet clean ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1 | Out-Null; dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --verbosity minimal 2>&1 | Select-String 'net10|succeeded|failed|total|passed|Total|Passed|Failed|Error'

tasks.label: Rename FastEndpoints Send methods
tasks.command: $files = Get-ChildItem -Path 'ChurchRegister.ApiService\Endpoints' -Filter '*.cs' -Recurse; $renames = @('OkAsync','NoContentAsync','NotFoundAsync','UnauthorizedAsync','ForbiddenAsync','BytesAsync','ErrorsAsync','CreatedAtAsync','StringAsync'); $total = 0; foreach ($file in $files) { $content = Get-Content $file.FullName -Raw; $changed = $false; foreach ($m in $renames) { $old = "await Send$m("; $new = "await Send.$m("; if ($content -match [regex]::Escape($old)) { $content = $content -replace [regex]::Escape($old), $new; $changed = $true; $total++ } }; if ($changed) { Set-Content $file.FullName $content -NoNewline; Write-Host "Updated: $($file.Name)" } }; Write-Host "Done. $total method rename(s) applied."

tasks.label: Build after major upgrades
tasks.command: dotnet restore ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1 | Select-String 'error|warning|Restore'; dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln --no-incremental 2>&1 | Select-String 'error CS|Build succeeded|FAILED|Error\('

tasks.label: Mass rename FastEndpoints Send methods
tasks.command:
$script = @'
$path = 'C:\GitHub\ChurchRegister\ChurchRegister.ApiService\Endpoints'
$files = Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Filter '*.cs' -Recurse
$methods = @('OkAsync','NoContentAsync','NotFoundAsync','UnauthorizedAsync','ForbiddenAsync','BytesAsync','ErrorsAsync','CreatedAtAsync','StringAsync','Async')
$total = 0
foreach ($file in $files) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($file.FullName)
    $orig = $content
    foreach ($m in $methods) {
        $old = 'await Send' + $m + '('
        $new = 'await Send.' + $m + '('
        $content = $content.Replace($old, $new)
    }
    if ($content -ne $orig) {
        [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file.FullName, $content)
        Write-Host ("Updated: " + $file.Name)
        $total++
    }
}
Write-Host ("Done. " + $total + " file(s) updated.")
'@
$script | Out-File -FilePath 'rename_send_methods.ps1' -Encoding utf8
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File rename_send_methods.ps1
Remove-Item rename_send_methods.ps1

tasks.label: Build ApiService post rename
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.ApiService/ChurchRegister.ApiService.csproj 2>&1 | Select-String 'error CS|Build succeeded|FAILED' | Select-Object -Last 20 | Out-String

tasks.label: Build post all major upgrades
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.sln 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match 'error CS|Build succeeded|FAILED|Error\(' } | Select-Object -Last 20

tasks.label: Clean build ApiService v2
tasks.command: dotnet build ChurchRegister.ApiService/ChurchRegister.ApiService.csproj --no-incremental 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match 'error CS|warning CS|Build succeeded|FAILED' } | Select-Object -Last 30

tasks.label: Fix remaining FastEndpoints issues
tasks.command:
$script = @"
`$path = 'C:\GitHub\ChurchRegister\ChurchRegister.ApiService\Endpoints'
`$files = Get-ChildItem -Path `$path -Filter '*.cs' -Recurse
`$count = 0
foreach (`$file in `$files) {
    `$c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText(`$file.FullName)
    `$orig = `$c
    `$c = `$c.Replace('await SendCreatedAtAsync<', 'await Send.CreatedAtAsync<')
    `$c = `$c.Replace('await Send.Async(', 'await Send.ResponseAsync(')
    if (`$c -ne `$orig) {
        [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText(`$file.FullName, `$c)
        `$count++
    }
}
Write-Host "Fixed `$count file(s)"
"@
$script | Set-Content fix_remaining.ps1 -Encoding utf8
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File fix_remaining.ps1
Remove-Item fix_remaining.ps1

tasks.label: Fix FastEndpoints Send patterns
tasks.command: $path = 'C:\GitHub\ChurchRegister\ChurchRegister.ApiService\Endpoints'; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Filter '*.cs' -Recurse; $count = 0; foreach ($file in $files) { $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($file.FullName); $orig = $c; $c = $c.Replace('await SendCreatedAtAsync<', 'await Send.CreatedAtAsync<'); $c = $c.Replace('await Send.Async(', 'await Send.ResponseAsync('); if ($c -ne $orig) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file.FullName, $c); $count++ } }; Write-Output "Fixed $count file(s)"

tasks.label: Run fix_fastendpoints.ps1
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File fix_fastendpoints.ps1

tasks.label: Test with TRX
tasks.command: dotnet test ChurchRegister.Tests/ChurchRegister.Tests.csproj --logger "trx;LogFileName=results.trx" --verbosity quiet; $trx = 'ChurchRegister.Tests/TestResults/results.trx'; if (Test-Path $trx) { $x = [xml](Get-Content $trx); $summary = $x.TestRun.ResultSummary.Counters; Write-Output "Total:$($summary.total) Passed:$($summary.passed) Failed:$($summary.failed)" } else { Write-Output 'No TRX' }
